sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n5075" key="*)ambou/lios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Ἀμβούλιος</orth>, (perh. connected with <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">βουλή</foreign>) title of Zeus, Athena, and the Dioscuri at Sparta, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0525.tlg001.perseus-grc1:3:13:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paus.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.13.4</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
